overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a densely packed cyberpunk city. The player character moves from a covered market arcade through narrow neon-lit alleys into a wide urban plaza, showcasing the game's distinctive futuristic architecture and vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market arcade with food vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market area passing by a burrito vending machine on the right

entered.detail: bright green and purple food vending machine with 'BURRITO XXL' branding
overhead concrete and metal structure covering the market street
large pink digital screen displaying 'LOVE HUB' advertisement
purple and pink fireworks exploding in the night sky above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered market arcade at night, dominated by neon lighting and digital advertisements. A prominent green 'BURRITO XXL' vending machine stands on the right while pink fireworks explode in the sky visible through gaps in the overhead canopy. The player walks forward through this sheltered commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with intense pink neon lighting and adult entertainment venues

events.description: exits covered market into narrow alley bathed in intense magenta and pink neon light

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the narrow neon-lit alley, passing pedestrians on both sides

notable_agents.action: person standing near the pink-lit shop entrance looking at the window

entered.detail: building facade with bright pink neon lights and XXX signage indicating adult entertainment
vertical strips of intense pink neon lighting running down the building face

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow alleyway intensely illuminated by magenta and pink neon lights from adult entertainment venues. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant colors overhead. The player moves through this enclosed corridor as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition alley with commercial signage leading to open plaza

events.description: alley widens significantly as the camera approaches the large open plaza ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the widening alley toward the bright open space visible in the distance

entered.detail: large teal and white neon sign reading 'softsys' mounted on building corner
massive futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and advertisements visible at the end of the alley
traditional-style red paper lanterns hanging on wires across the alley

segments.scene_description: The alley gradually widens as the player approaches a large open plaza. A prominent 'softsys' neon sign appears on the right, while red lanterns hang overhead. The massive cyberpunk tower looms ahead, marking the transition from the enclosed alley to the open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with distinctive modernist architecture

events.description: exits narrow alley into wide open plaza with the distinctive blue and red geometric building dominating the view

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza area toward the large blue building, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking across the plaza in the same direction

entered.detail: distinctive modernist building with teal blue facade and bold red geometric rectangular accents
tall vertical digital advertisement screen showing animated content
wide concrete pedestrian plaza with crosswalk markings and open sightlines

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alley into a vast open plaza dominated by a striking blue building with red geometric accents. The space opens up dramatically with full sky visibility and moderate crowds of pedestrians crossing the concrete plaza. Street lamps and digital billboards provide illumination in this urban downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with overhead pedestrian walkways

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing numerous pedestrians and approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: man in brown leather jacket walking toward the camera
woman with bright pink hair standing near the crosswalk

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting buildings overhead with metal support structures
grey concrete and glass high-rise building with geometric facade patterns

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk along the edge of the plaza, with a tall modern building on the left and an overhead pedestrian bridge spanning the street ahead. The crowd density remains moderate with pedestrians walking in both directions. The player continues toward the intersection as the distinctive blue building recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial arcade through narrow neon corridors and into a vast, open urban plaza. It begins within a covered market dominated by digital advertisements and a green vending machine, with pink fireworks bursting through gaps in the overhead canopy. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow alleyway where wet asphalt reflects intense magenta and pink neon lights from surrounding venues. The scene then expands as the alley widens past red lanterns and a softsys sign, revealing a massive cyberpunk tower that signals the transition into a wide downtown area. Finally, the camera emerges into a sprawling plaza featuring a striking blue building with red accents before gliding along a sidewalk toward a pedestrian bridge and a busy city intersection.
